message:
fix(templates): remove client-side markdown fallback, harden XSS surface

- mail_message: remove entire client-side marked.parse fallback; always
  use server-rendered body_html (pre-sanitized by ammonia)
- mail_unified_inbox: same removal of client-side markdown path
- base.html: disable allowHTML on Tippy tooltips to prevent injection,
  add white-space:pre-line for tooltip readability
- mail_inbox: use pre-computed thread_url from server context
- mail_search: route links through agentMailAppendAuth/agentMailAbsoluteUrl
  helpers, use server-built next_page_url for pagination, use data
  attributes for deep-link copy instead of inline window.location

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -207,8 +207,8 @@
